steps.title: Translate the pricing into an expression
steps.content: The carpenter charges a flat $216 for the first 3 hours, then $60 per additional hour. When x > 3, the number of additional hours is (x - 3), so the total is y = 216 + 60(x - 3).

steps.title: Match against the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: y = 60x + 216 would charge $216 on top of $60 per hour from hour 0. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: y = 216x + 396 charges $216 per hour, which is wrong. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: y = 60x + 36. Matches our derivation. Works.
  • Choice D: y = 216x + 60 charges $216 per hour. Eliminated.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
